source_label: He et al., 'Masked Autoencoders Are Scalable Vision Learners' (arXiv 2111.06377)
notes: FAIR masked-image SSL (Masked AutoEncoder) that reconstructs pixels — the model JEPA argues against. Genuinely unsettled: many say the word 'may', others spell 'em-ay-EE'; no author statement, and it collides with 'mean absolute error'.
